title: Resource Object Type (0x21)
description: Layout for triplet 0x21: ObjType followed by ConData (constant data).
notes: Offsets are relative to triplet start. This layout omits the triplet length and Tid bytes (those are handled at runtime).

elements.name: ConData
elements.description: Constant data (CODE) that follows the ObjType. Length is determined by the triplet length minus header bytes.
